mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 2% signals monetary easing that reduces the discount rate applied to equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors rotate into equities seeking yield.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS is below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals labor market deterioration that triggers equity risk-off positioning, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reduce equity exposure.
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: Negative 5-day forward returns occur in less than 50% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint contraction in retail sales and housing starts signals weakening consumer demand and construction activity, reducing corporate earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as the market reprices growth expectations downward.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% and HOUST declines > 5% in same month
failure_condition: Negative 60-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of jointly triggered instances, or the interaction effect (joint signal) shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10) in logistic regression versus single-series models.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained month-over-month decline in industrial production below 104.0 signals supply-side weakness that constrains corporate profitability and output growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings forecasts are revised downward.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day forward returns occur in less than 52% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint expansion in payroll employment and a declining unemployment rate signals robust labor market momentum that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as the market prices in sustained economic expansion.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases > 150k in 1 month AND UNRATE declines > 0.1pp in 1 month
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns occur in less than 58% of jointly triggered instances, or the interaction coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: A rising inflation environment (CPIAUCSL growth > 3% annualized) combined with elevated federal funds rates above 3% signals monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates and reduced real earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day forward returns occur in less than 54% of jointly triggered instances, or the joint signal shows lower predictive power than FEDFUNDS alone (Rank IC comparison).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts above 1200 thousand units signals strong residential investment demand and forward-looking economic optimism, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as the market interprets housing strength as a leading indicator of broader economic expansion.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns occur in less than 53% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real GDP growth (GDPC1 growth < 2% annualized) signals slowing economic expansion that reduces corporate earnings growth expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as the market reprices growth and recession risk premiums upward.
failure_condition: Negative 60-day forward returns occur in less than 56% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.
